mapper.select: select no, id, password, nickname, role , to_char(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as regDate from br_member where id = #{id} and password = #{password}
mapper.insert: insert into br_member(no, id, password, nickname) values(seq_br_member_no.nextval, #{id}, #{password}, #{nickname})
mapper.select: select count(*) from br_member where id = #{id}
select no, id, nickname, face_descriptor as faceDescriptor from br_member where face_descriptor is not null
select no, id, nickname, role , to_char(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as regDate from br_member where no = #{no}
select no, id, nickname, role , to_char(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as regDate , face_descriptor as faceDescriptor from br_member order by no
select no, id, nickname, role, provider, provider_id as providerId , to_char(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as regDate from br_member where provider = #{provider} and provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.insert:
select seq_br_member_no.nextval from dual
insert into br_member(no, id, nickname, provider, provider_id) values(#{no}, #{id}, #{nickname}, #{provider}, #{providerId})
